name: Verify side navigation displays all expected links
description:
As a user visiting the Sauce Demo site
  I want all header and footer links to be visible and navigate to the correct pages
  So that I can browse the site without broken or misdirected links
descriptionHtml:
As a user visiting the Sauce Demo site
I want all header and footer links to be visible and navigate to the correct pages
So that I can browse the site without broken or misdirected links
statusMessage: Link 'Home' not found in side navigation
statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: Link 'Home' not found in side navigation
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at com.retail.stepdefinitions.HeaderNavigationSteps.verifySeePointNavigationLink(HeaderNavigationSteps.java:86)
	at ✽.I should see the link "Home" in the side navigation(file:///home/runner/work/CucumberPractice/CucumberPractice/src/test/resources/features/header/header.feature:80)

steps.name: Given  I am on the Sauce Demo homepage "https://sauce-demo.myshopify.com/"
Then  I should see the link "Home" in the side navigation

steps.name: And  I should see the link "Catalog" in the side navigation
And  I should see the link "Blog" in the side navigation
And  I should see the link "About Us" in the side navigation
And  I should see the link "Wish list" in the side navigation
And  I should see the link "Refer a friend" in the side navigation
